popularStory.headline: All Saints Church, Pytchley, Northamptonshire
popularStory.description:
In 1402, Owen Isom's 11th Great Grandfather, Robert Isham, was born in Pytchley, Northamptonshire.  Robert was a justice of the peace for Northamptonshire.

Robert Isham, justice of the peace for Nort …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Isham於1402年3月2日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾利時，他的父親Robert Isham29歲，母親Julianna Bradfield32歲。他於大約1426年與Elizabeth de Knuston在英國諾薩普頓史爾易斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1467年在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特被列為justice of the peace for northamptonshire。他去世於1475年在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Isham于1402年3月2日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾利时，他的父亲Robert Isham29岁，母亲Julianna Bradfield32岁。他于大约1426年与Elizabeth de Knuston在英国諾薩普頓史爾易斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1467年在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特被列为justice of the peace for northamptonshire。他去世于1475年在他的家乡享年73岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾利。

nameMeanings.name: Isham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): habitational name from Isham, Northamptonshire. See   Isom  , compare   Esham  .

variants.name: Esham
meanings: English: variant of   Isham  . This surname is no longer found in Britain.
History: The name is first recorded in Northamton County, VA, when Daniel Esham came over as an indentured servant in 1651.

variants.name: Isom
meanings: English (Essex): habitational name from Isham in Northamptonshire. The placename is derived from the river name Ise (of Celtic origin) + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

variants.name: Ishman
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Isham  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Isham was born on 2 March 1402, in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Robert Isham, was 29 and his mother, Julianna Bradfield, was 32. He married Elizabeth de Knuston about 1426, in Irchester, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1467, at the age of 65, his occupation is listed as justice of the peace for northamptonshire in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England. He died in 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Isham est né le 2 mars 1402, à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Isham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Julianna Bradfield, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Knuston environ 1426, à Irchester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1467, à l’âge de 65 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the peace for northamptonshire à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Isham am 2. März 1402 in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Isham 29 und seine Mutter Julianna Bradfield 32. Er hat um 1426 in Irchester, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth de Knuston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1467, als er 65 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of the peace for northamptonshire in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Isham è nato il il 2 marzo 1402 nel Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Isham, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Julianna Bradfield, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Knuston circa 1426, nel Irchester, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1467, all'età di 65 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the peace for northamptonshire nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England. Morì nel 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ishamが1402年3月2日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーで生まれた時，父Robert Ishamは29歳，母Julianna Bradfieldは32歳であった。約1426年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアイルチェスターでElizabeth de Knustonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1467年，65歳の時，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターでの職業はjustice of the peace for northamptonshireと記録されている。彼は1475年に故郷で73歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Isham(이)가 1402년 3월 2일 영국 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Isham(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna Bradfield(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국 노르섬프토실르 이르체스터에서 Elizabeth de Knuston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1467년, 65세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 justice of the peace for northamptonshire이었다. 그는 1475년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에 묻혔다.

pt.from 9 March 1468 to 4 November 1469: de 9 de março de 1468 a 4 de novembro de 1469
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Isham nasceu em 2 de março de 1402, em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Isham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Julianna Bradfield, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Knuston aproximadamente 1426, em Irchester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1467, com 65 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of the peace for northamptonshire em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1475, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Isham родился 2 марта 1402 г. в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Isham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Julianna Bradfield, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Knuston около 1426 г. в местности ирчестир, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1467 году, в возрасте 65 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of the peace for northamptonshire в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер в 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Isham nació el 2 de marzo de 1402, en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Isham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Julianna Bradfield, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Knuston aproximadamente 1426, en Irchester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1467, a la edad de 65 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of the peace for northamptonshire en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
